prompt: I need to sync secrets from Infisical to Azure Key Vault. My secret names use underscores like DATABASE_URL and API_KEY. Will that cause any issues? Also what permissions does my service principal need?
assertions: Correctly warns that Azure Key Vault converts underscores to hyphens (DATABASE_URL becomes DATABASE-URL)
Lists required permissions: secrets/list, secrets/get, secrets/set, and secrets/recover
Recommends Key Vault Secrets Officer role as the appropriate built-in role
Explains why secrets/recover is needed (Azure soft-delete behavior)
Mentions the vault base URL as a required destination config field
